race.comment: OAK HILL (6) dramatically returned to form last start in the Group 2 Moreton Cup over this course and distance, charging home late to just miss the upset win. Back a level today and with a repeat of that last run he is the one they have to beat. FIRE STAR (13) raced handy and refused to lie down last time out, beaten under a length in the Listed Hinkler here at 1200m. Should be peaking third-up and makes plenty of appeal down in the weights. GIVEMETHEBEATBOYS (7) showed pace but couldn't do it at both ends in the 1000m Lightning here three weeks ago. Gets some weight relief today and the shades go on so he might be a surprise packet. HIDDEN WEALTH (3) led but couldn't keep going in the Moreton Cup last start, just missing the placings. Has a fine record here at the trip so shouldn't be taken lightly.
